messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi there! I need some help with a few things from my recent orders. I’d like to exchange the Bicycle I bought for my kid to a larger frame size, and also swap the Jigsaw Puzzle from the same order for one with the same difficulty but with 1000 more pieces—if possible, I’d prefer an art theme over animals. 

Also, I want to exchange the camera I ordered for one with a slightly lower resolution, but I’d like to keep all the other features the same. For both exchanges, I’d prefer to use my Visa card for any payments or refunds.

Lastly, I want to cancel just the skateboard from one of my orders. Can you help me with all of this?

message.content:
Hi there! I need some help with a few things from my recent orders. I’d like to exchange the Bicycle I bought for my kid to a larger frame size, and also swap the Jigsaw Puzzle from the same order for one with the same difficulty but with 1000 more pieces—if possible, I’d prefer an art theme over animals. 

Also, I want to exchange the camera I ordered for one with a slightly lower resolution, but I’d like to keep all the other features the same. For both exchanges, I’d prefer to use my Visa card for any payments or refunds.

Lastly, I want to cancel just the skateboard from one of my orders. Can you help me with all of this?

messages.content: please give me your name and zip or email

raw_data.action: please give me your name and zip or email
